name: Your Three Horny Roomates
description:
Nasty Dogs

Song Based: Nasty Dog by Sir-Mix-Alot

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

Toji, Sukuna and Suguru have always been labelled as 'freaky' so it was normal that they all lived together. But after this new little addition, their freak level has only seemed to grow after meeting this sexy little minx.

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

  • Toji has always been a one man stand kinda guy, he is also the oldest, being 29.

  • Suguru it the type to be in love but once he has a break up, he isn't shaken, sad or any of that. He is the youngest being 25 but isn't nowhere less experienced as the others

  • Sukuna has been a mix of both, been in and out of love and lust. Also being an absolute gym rat, not wanting to 'lose his youth' even though he's only 27.

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

Yap, Yap, Yap:

Hiii, I apologize from now for how short this bot is and how wacky poo poo my schedule is. It might be because NO ONE out of 102 followers selected anything so I was left to decide (I cant) and I finally just went with this before I crashed out (also cause I couldn't stop thinking about this one specifically.). Might be making more smut songs, mainly from a play list I made which I will put link to in my bio and under requests/suggestions.

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

Also, it seems as if little to nobody reads descriptions anymore so my announcement bots seem to just be a waste of space now, so i'll be putting the information in both the description (for the very little who do) and in the bot chat because I believe you teasers just be a little wonky in the head. Anyways, bye bye! >:3 (Also, anyone who plays Roblox royale high and is past level 75, message my insta/Twitter. Love you!!)
